zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Vaudémont於1305年出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特時，她的父親Comte Henri III de Vaudémont21歲，母親Isabelle de Lorraine33歲。她於1322年與Anseau de Joinville France Marechal結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1335年1月3日之前，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內喬維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Vaudémont于1305年出生在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒瓦德艾蒙特时，她的父亲Comte Henri III de Vaudémont21岁，母亲Isabelle de Lorraine33岁。她于1322年与Anseau de Joinville France Marechal结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1335年1月3日之前，埋葬在法国哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內喬維爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Vaudémont was born in 1305, in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, her father, Comte Henri III de Vaudémont, was 21 and her mother, Isabelle de Lorraine, was 33. She married Anseau de Joinville France Marechal in 1322. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 3 January 1335, and was buried in Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Vaudémont est née en 1305, à Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Comte Henri III de Vaudémont, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Lorraine, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Anseau de Joinville France Marechal en 1322. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 3 janvier 1335, et a été enterrée à Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Vaudémont 1305 in Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Comte Henri III de Vaudémont 21 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Lorraine 33. Sie hat 1322 Anseau de Joinville France Marechal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 3. Januar 1335 und wurde in Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Vaudémont è nata il nel 1305 nel Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Comte Henri III de Vaudémont, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Isabelle de Lorraine, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Anseau de Joinville France Marechal nel 1322. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 3 gennaio 1335, e fu sepolta a Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Vaudémontが1305年にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルヴァウドeモントで生まれた時，父Comte Henri III de Vaudémontは21歳，母Isabelle de Lorraineは33歳であった。1322年にAnseau de Joinville France Marechalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1335年1月3日以前に死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンジョインヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Vaudémont(이)가 1305년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 바드e몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Comte Henri III de Vaudémont(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Lorraine(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1322년 Anseau de Joinville France Marechal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1335년 1월 3일 이전 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 조인빌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Vaudémont nasceu em 1305, em Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Comte Henri III de Vaudémont, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Lorraine, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Anseau de Joinville France Marechal em 1322. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 3 de janeiro de 1335, e foi sepultada em Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Vaudémont родилась в 1305 г. в местности ваудeмонт, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Comte Henri III de Vaudémont было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Lorraine, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Anseau de Joinville France Marechal в 1322 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 3 январь 1335 г. и была похоронена в местности джоинвилл, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Vaudémont nació en 1305, en Vaudémont, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Comte Henri III de Vaudémont, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Lorraine, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Anseau de Joinville France Marechal en 1322. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 3 de enero de 1335, y fue sepultada en Joinville, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
